name: Paediatrics
description: Comprehensive child healthcare from newborn to adolescent, including neonatology, paediatric surgery, and developmental medicine.

name: Neurology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of disorders of the brain, spinal cord, and nervous system, including stroke, epilepsy, and Parkinson's disease.

name: General Surgery
description: Advanced surgical care including laparoscopic, robotic, and open procedures for abdominal, breast, and endocrine conditions.

name: Dermatology
description: Treatment of skin, hair, and nail disorders, including cosmetic dermatology, laser therapies, and complex dermatological conditions.

name: Cardiology
description: Comprehensive heart care including interventional cardiology, electrophysiology, heart failure management, and preventive cardiology.

name: Orthopaedics
description: Expert care for bones, joints, muscles, and ligaments, including joint replacement, sports medicine, and spine surgery.

name: Nephrology & Urology
description: Specialised care for kidney diseases, urinary tract disorders, and kidney transplantation including robotic transplant procedures.

name: Nutrition & Dietetics
description: Evidence-based nutritional therapy for weight management, metabolic disorders, eating disorders, and disease-specific dietary needs.

name: Gastroenterology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of digestive system disorders including liver diseases, IBD, GERD, and advanced therapeutic endoscopy.

name: Obstetrics & Gynaecology
description: Complete women's health care including high-risk pregnancy, laparoscopic gynaecological surgery, and reproductive medicine.

name: Oncology
description: Comprehensive cancer care including medical oncology, radiation therapy, surgical oncology, and palliative care services.

name: Pulmonology
description: Treatment of respiratory conditions including asthma, COPD, sleep apnoea, and interstitial lung diseases.

name: Endocrinology
description: Management of hormonal and metabolic disorders including diabetes, thyroid conditions, and adrenal disorders.

name: Ophthalmology
description: Complete eye care including LASIK surgery, cataract treatment, glaucoma management, and retinal disorders.

name: ENT (Ear, Nose & Throat)
description: Diagnosis and treatment of ear, nose, throat, head, and neck disorders including cochlear implants and sinus surgery.

name: Psychiatry & Mental Health
description: Compassionate mental health care including psychiatry, psychology, addiction medicine, and child & adolescent psychiatry.

name: Rheumatology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of autoimmune and inflammatory conditions including rheumatoid arthritis, lupus, and vasculitis.

name: Haematology
description: Specialised care for blood disorders including anaemia, bleeding disorders, leukaemia, lymphoma, and bone marrow transplantation.

name: Neurosurgery
description: Surgical treatment of brain and spinal cord conditions including brain tumours, aneurysms, and spinal deformities.

name: Plastic & Reconstructive Surgery
description: Aesthetic and reconstructive surgical procedures including burn care, hand surgery, and post-cancer reconstruction.

name: Cardiothoracic Surgery
description: Surgical procedures of the heart and chest including bypass surgery, valve repair/replacement, and thoracic procedures.

name: Vascular Surgery
description: Treatment of diseases affecting blood vessels including aortic aneurysm, peripheral artery disease, and varicose veins.

name: Transplant Medicine
description: Organ transplantation including kidney, liver, and bone marrow transplants with comprehensive pre and post-transplant care.

name: Reproductive Medicine & IVF
description: Advanced fertility treatments including IVF, IUI, egg freezing, and comprehensive reproductive endocrinology services.

name: Neonatology
description: Specialised care for newborns, especially premature and critically ill neonates in our Level-III NICU.

name: Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation
description: Evidence-based physical therapy, occupational therapy, and rehabilitation for post-surgical and neurological recovery.

name: Pain Management
description: Multidisciplinary management of acute and chronic pain conditions using interventional procedures and pharmacotherapy.

name: Palliative Care
description: Compassionate care focusing on quality of life for patients with serious illness, including pain relief and emotional support.

name: Emergency & Trauma
description: 24/7 emergency and trauma care with advanced life-support capabilities, trauma surgery, and critical care expertise.

name: Critical Care & ICU
description: Comprehensive intensive care for critically ill patients with 96 ICU beds staffed by experienced intensivists.

name: Anaesthesiology
description: Expert anaesthetic care for surgical procedures, pain management, and critical care including regional and neuraxial techniques.

name: Radiology & Imaging
description: Advanced diagnostic imaging including MRI, CT, PET-CT, ultrasound, and interventional radiology procedures.

name: Pathology & Laboratory
description: Comprehensive diagnostic laboratory services including histopathology, cytology, molecular diagnostics, and blood banking.

name: Nuclear Medicine
description: Molecular imaging and targeted therapy using radioactive isotopes for cancer diagnosis and treatment.

name: Sports Medicine
description: Specialised care for sports injuries, athletic performance optimisation, and exercise-related medical conditions.

name: Dental & Maxillofacial Surgery
description: Comprehensive dental care and oral-maxillofacial surgery including implants, orthodontics, and jaw surgeries.

name: Geriatrics
description: Holistic healthcare for elderly patients addressing multiple chronic conditions, cognitive decline, and fall prevention.

name: Allergy & Immunology
description: Diagnosis and management of allergic conditions, asthma, immunodeficiency disorders, and autoimmune diseases.

name: Infectious Disease
description: Management of complex infections, tropical diseases, HIV care, and antimicrobial stewardship programmes.

name: Internal Medicine
description: General medical care for adults with complex multi-system conditions, preventive care, and chronic disease management.

name: Spine Surgery
description: Surgical and non-surgical treatment of spinal conditions including disc herniation, spinal stenosis, and scoliosis.

name: Bariatric Surgery
description: Surgical weight loss procedures including gastric bypass, sleeve gastrectomy, and comprehensive pre/post-operative support.

name: Liver & Hepatology
description: Specialised care for liver diseases including hepatitis, cirrhosis, fatty liver disease, and liver transplantation.

name: Diabetes & Endocrinology
description: Comprehensive diabetes management including insulin therapy, continuous glucose monitoring, and diabetic complication care.

name: Preventive Health & Wellness
description: Proactive health screening, lifestyle medicine, corporate health programmes, and personalised wellness plans.
